sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n973" key="a)guio/peza" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγυιό-πεζα</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Κουρῆτις, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, mystical name for Pythagorean triad, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicom.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg001:143B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Bibl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">143B.</biblScope> </bibl> </entryFree>
